columns.name: Kundepostnr
columns.description: Postal code of the customer's address

columns.name: Kommunenr
columns.description: Municipality number associated with the customer's address

columns.name: Kommunenavn
columns.description: Name of the municipality where the customer is located

columns.name: Telefonnr
columns.description: Primary telephone number of the customer

columns.name: Telefon2
columns.description: Secondary telephone number of the customer

columns.name: Telefon3
columns.description: Tertiary telephone number of the customer

columns.name: Bilhenger
columns.description: Indicates if the customer is associated with car rental services

columns.name: Nord
columns.description: Geographical coordinate in the north direction (possibly for mapping purposes)

columns.name: Ost
columns.description: Geographical coordinate in the east direction (possibly for mapping purposes)

columns.name: Transpmerknad
columns.description: Additional notes or instructions for transportation purposes

columns.name: Telefonnr_sms
columns.description: Phone number used for SMS communications with the customer
